name: Amazon sellers processing 10–20 invoices/month tool
description: For Amazon sellers processing 10–20 invoices/month, invoice discrepancies cause cash flow gaps. We automatically reconcile vendor invoices with purchase orders instead of manual reconciliation of invoices and purchase orders.
problem_solved: Invoice discrepancies leading to cash flow gaps

locked_fields.primary_problem: Invoice discrepancies leading to cash flow gaps
